definition: share of outputs passing parser by stage, condition, and condition-stage
claim_boundary_note: Not equivalent to answer correctness or evidence-state reliability
Must be computed separately for decision, audit, escalation
Shows condition sensitivity but not causal proof beyond controlled setup

definition: difference in condition effect across stages
paired clean-vs-degraded delta for same base case
audit approval/assurance despite degraded or insufficient evidence
cases where escalation corrects or safely routes a degraded-evidence problem
cases where escalation reinforces, misses, or closes a degraded-evidence problem
within-case deltas for each degraded condition vs clean
bootstrap or paired intervals around deltas/rates
